name: lofi-blue-sky
description: A procedurally generated lofi glitch-sky, synthesized entirely in a fragment shader from a hash. One shared GLSL core, two frames: a size-disciplined fxhash token and a browser generator.
author: Chris Portka (djpants)

scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run build:fxhash && npm run build:web
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/core/dist targets/fxhash/dist targets/web/dist *.tsbuildinfo packages/core/*.tsbuildinfo targets/*/*.tsbuildinfo
